raw_cv_text:
Lihna Delić
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: lihna.delic@outlook.com | LinkedIn: lihna-delić | GitHub: LihnaDelić | https://lihnadelic.dev
EDUCATION
ETH Zurich (Swiss Federal Institute of Technology) | M.S. Computer Science 2008-2010
Specialized in distributed systems and compilers, achieving top 5% in program ranking
Led capstone project on parallel processing optimization that reduced computation time by 35%
University of Belgrade | B.S. Computer Science 2004-2008
Graduated summa cum laude with focus on algorithms and data structures
Won university programming competition and represented institution at Balkan Olympiad in Informatics
EXPERIENCE
Palantir Technologies | Principal Software Engineer, Data Infrastructure 2020-Present
Led architecture redesign of core data pipeline serving 200+ enterprise clients, reducing query latency by 62% and
improving system throughput by 4.2x
Mentored team of 8 senior engineers across 3 continents, establishing best practices that reduced production incidents by
78%
Drove adoption of Kubernetes migration strategy for legacy systems, delivering $12M in annual infrastructure cost
savings
Stripe | Principal Engineer, Platform Services 2017-2020
Architected and deployed real-time event processing system handling 1.2M events per second with <100ms P99 latency,
supporting $50B+ annual transaction volume
Owned platform reliability improvements that increased system uptime from 99.9% to 99.99%, preventing estimated
$8.5M in customer revenue loss
Implemented comprehensive observability framework reducing mean time to resolution (MTTR) for production incidents
from 45 minutes to 8 minutes
Cloudflare | Senior Principal Engineer, Performance & Optimization 2014-2017
Developed novel edge caching algorithm that improved cache hit rates by 41% across 180+ data centers globally, serving
10M+ requests per second
Engineered distributed consensus protocol for configuration management, reducing deployment time from 12 minutes to
90 seconds across fleet
Established engineering excellence program that increased code review coverage to 100% and reduced critical security
findings by 84%
Shopify | Principal Software Engineer, Payments Platform 2011-2014
Built payment processing microservices handling 50K transactions per second with 99.99% uptime, processing $5B+
annually
Designed resilient multi-region failover system that prevented 15 potential outages, maintaining zero payment processing
downtime
Created performance optimization framework that reduced API response times by 58%, improving merchant conversion
rates by 3.2%
Datadog | Senior Software Engineer, Agent & Core Infrastructure 2010-2011
Contributed to agent scalability improvements enabling monitoring of 500K+ hosts, growing product market adoption by
340%
Implemented efficient metrics compression algorithm reducing data transmission bandwidth by 53% without accuracy
loss
Developed distributed tracing framework adopted by 12,000+ enterprise customers worldwide
PROJECTS
VectorFlow - Distributed Vector Database | Rust, CUDA, gRPC, Arrow, Kubernetes 2021-Present
Built high-performance vector similarity search engine achieving 100K queries per second with sub-5ms latency on
billion-scale datasets
Open-source project garnered 8,500+ GitHub stars and adopted by 200+ organizations for production ML inference
workloads
QueryCompiler - SQL Optimization Engine | C++, LLVM, Python, PostgreSQL 2018-2020
Designed adaptive query optimization system improving complex SQL execution by up to 73% without application
changes
Published peer-reviewed paper with 520+ academic citations detailing novel cost-based optimization techniques
EXTRACURRICULAR
Systems & Distributed Computing Community (Open Source Foundation) | Core Contributor & 2015-Present
Technical Lead
Led RFC process for major protocol standard adopted by 50+ companies, influencing architecture decisions for
infrastructure affecting 2B+ users
Mentored 25+ junior engineers transitioning to senior roles, with 18 advancing to leadership positions at FAANG
companies
Conference Speaker - DistributedSystems Conference, QCon, Velocity | Technical Speaker & Session 2016-Present
Chair
Delivered talks on large-scale infrastructure design reaching 12,000+ engineers across three continents with 94%
satisfaction rating
Published 8 technical articles generating 150K+ views on distributed systems, microservices, and performance
optimization
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, Go, Rust, C++, Java, TypeScript, SQL, Scala
Technologies – Kubernetes, Apache Kafka, PostgreSQL, Redis, gRPC, Apache Spark, Apache Arrow, CUDA, Protocol
Buffers, GraphQL, Docker, Envoy Proxy
Tools – Git, CI/CD (Jenkins, GitHub Actions), Terraform, Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, Jaeger, ELK Stack, ArgoCD, Helm
name: Lihna Delić
